Config.Overwrite Forbidden Maze map warp: Changes warps to teleport back and forth between Witch Warp Cave and Witch Swamp ignoring Forbidden Maze SVE map.
Config.Add Path to Forbidden Maze map.na: Add Path to Forbidden Maze map
Config.Add Path to Forbidden Maze map.de: Adds path to Forbidden Maze on the left side of Witch Swamp Map (near Zic's campfire spot)
Config.Water Overlay.name: Water Overlay
Config.Darker Ambient Light.name: Darker Ambient Light
npc.Zic.name: Zic
npc.Zic.gift2: Oh, you're giving me it? That's so nice! Thank you!
npc.Zic.gift3: I wouldn't put it in my pot but thanks anyways.
npc.Zic.gift5: Thanks! Don't really know what to do with this though.
object.Spotted_Crayfish.name: Spotted Crayfish
object.Spotted_Crayfish.description: Must have changed its color due to swamp waters.
object.Swamp_Slug.name: Swamp Slug
object.Swamp_Slug.description: It secretes a lot of mucus as a defense mechanism.
object.Water_Bug.name: Water Bug
object.Water_Bug.description: A big carnivorous beetle... Better not to stick your fingers in its jaws.
object.Brown_Amanita.name: Brown Amanita
object.Brown_Amanita.description: Doesn't look safe to eat at all.
object.Cooking_Pot.name: Cooking Pot
object.Crayfish_Soup.name: Crayfish Soup
object.Crayfish_Soup.description: Dense and slimy, with unique purplish color.
object.Fancy_Blanket.name: Fancy Blanket
object.Giant_Horsehoe_Crab.name: Giant Horsehoe Crab
object.Giant_Horsehoe_Crab.description: Despite such creepy appearance those are shy and humble creatures. Truly a 'Living Fossil!'
object.Ginger_Tincture.name: Ginger Tincture
object.Ginger_Tincture.description: A bottle of brew made out of mushrooms, ginger and swamp herbs. Gives immunity against debuffs and reduces digestive problems!
object.Mushroom_Kebab.name: Mushroom Kebab
object.Mushroom_Kebab.description: Lots of mushroom caps on a stick. Crunchy!
object.Pemmican.name: Pemmican
object.Pemmican.description: Dried fish mixed with fatty bug meat. Very nutritious despite its unpleasant appearance.
object.Purple_Algae.name: Purple Algae
object.Swamp_Herb.name: Swamp Herb
object.Swamp_Leech.name: Swamp Leech
object.Swamp_Leech.description: Usually leeches are used in medicine... but this one has enormous size!
object.Vile_Ancient_Fruit.name: Vile Ancient Fruit
object.Void_Minnow.name: Void Minnow
object.Void_Minnow.description: It's skin so thin that you can even see the insides
object.Void_Mint_Leaves.name: Void Mint Leaves
object.Void_Mint_Tea.name: Void Mint Tea
object.Void_Mint_Tea.description: Slightly bitter, with cinnamon aroma and minty aftertaste. Tones you up!
object.Vile_Ancient_Fruit_Seeds.name: Vile Ancient Fruit Seeds
object.Void_Mint_Seeds.name: Void Mint Seeds
object.Void_Mint_Seeds.description: Even the seeds have tiny spikes on them.
object.Suspicious_Pie.name: Suspicious Pie
object.Suspicious_Pie.description: Now you're really wonder what's inside...
Aimon111.swamp2: There's mold on those rice sprouts.
Aimon111.swamp3: The tools look all rusty... seems it hasn't been used in years.
Aimon111.swamp4: You peek inside the watering can. But there's giant spider hisses at you!
Aimon111.swamp6: The label on crate says 'Amanita Muscaria'.
Aimon111.swamp7: Those crops don't look that healthy. Seems like nobody waters it.
Aimon111.swamp8: Looks like Ancient fruit. But there's something wrong with it...
Aimon111.swamp9: Those leaves are covered in sharp spikes. Better not to touch them without gloves.
Aimon111.swamp10: You can see remains of fish bones in the fire pit.
Aimon111.swamp2.n: Those rice sprouts look healthy and strong.
Aimon111.swamp3.n: The tools have fresh dirt on them. Seems like it's used quite often.
Aimon111.swamp7.n: Those crops seem good and well cared.
WizardGingerTinctureQuest: I would ask you to visit me as soon as possible. We have a very important matter to discuss...   ^   -M. Rasmodius, Wizard%item quest 1810912352 true %%[#]Wizard's Invite
WizardGingerTinctureSeeds: Greetings, adept.^I have finished my experiments with specimens you brought. Turns out there's not so much magic potential, I think it cannot preserve mana well because of void essense contained in the soil in which it grew... I have enclosed in this package the leftover seeds. Use it wisely.   ^    -M. Rasmodius, Wizard %item id Aimon111.WitchSwampOverhaulCP_Vile_Ancient_Fruit_Seeds 3 %%%item id Aimon111.WitchSwampOverhaulCP_Void_Mint_Seeds 3 %%[#]Seeds From the Wizard
AlectoGingerTinctureSeeds: Hello sweetie < ^ Just wanted to say thanks for helping with those fertilizers... Even though they didn't do anything, but it's not your fault. ^^ P.S. I hope Kevin didn't eat all the seeds while delivering the letter!   ^    -Alecto %item id Aimon111.WitchSwampOverhaulCP_Vile_Ancient_Fruit_Seeds 3 %%%item id Aimon111.WitchSwampOverhaulCP_Void_Mint_Seeds 3 %%[#]Alecto's Gift
GoblincookingPotGot: ...don't mind me i'm just random useless letter used for some quest to work...
quest.1810912351.description: Witch asked to bring a good quality fertilizer for her crops... a really high quality one!
quest.1810912351.description1: Bring 10 Deluxe Fertilizers into Witch Swamp.
quest.1810912352.description: Wizard wants to talk to you about some very important matter...
quest.1810912353.description: Wizard asked to bring him some crop specimens from Witch's garden for his research... He also asked for high quality fertilizers.
quest.1810912353.description1: Collect some crops from Witch's Swamp garden.
quest.1810912354.description: Wizard asked to bring him some crop specimens from Witch's garden for his research.. He also asked for high quality fertilizers.
quest.1810912354.description1: Bring 10 Deluxe Fertilizers into Wizard's tower.
quest.1810912355.description: Goblin asked you to help with getting a new cooking pot.
quest.1810912356.description: Goblin asked you to help with getting a new cooking pot.
quest.1810912356.description1: Bring new cooking pot to Goblin.
quest.1810912357.description: Clint agreed to forge a new pot for Goblin, he just needs materials for work.
quest.1810912358.description: Goblin needs something warm to wear... Maybe Emily can help with making a warm blanket?
quest.1810912359.description: Goblin needs something warm to wear... Emily can sew a warm blanket, but she needs the materials first.
quest.1810912359.description1: Bring 5 Wool and 5 Cloth into Emily's House.
quest.1810912360.description: Emily made a warm blanket! It's time to bring it to Goblin.
Goblin_CharacterDialogue_001: My name is Zic by the way.#@, you say? I like that name!# I'm really glad we've met!#...$6#Hey, do you have some more of that tasty stuff?$h#
Aimon111.Goblin_DumpsterDiveComment: Only bones in there...#I already ate everything.$6
Aimon111.GoblinLinusGarbage: I went on the surface to look for forage recently.$u#And something very big and hairy almost jumped on me right when I was searching in that big green box!$l#I barely managed to survive!$l#Venturing outside is far more dangerous than I thought.
Aimon111.Goblin2hearts: Thanks for visiting me so often.#It really makes me happy knowing I have friend like you.
Aimon111.Goblin4heartsNewjob: I'm glad I have duties now.#Doing nothing all day was kinda demotivating.$u
Aimon111.Goblin6hearts: I'm eager to cook dinner in this new shiny pot today!$l
Aimon111.Goblin8hearts: My people know lots of unique and special foods.#Living in such place and dealing with scarce supplies forces us to improvise.$u
Aimon111.Goblin10hearts: I wandered near the cave entrance after you left.#I found a big green box...$u#...and it smelled delicious!$h#Haven't managed to open it though...yet.
Aimon111.GoblinSebastian: I was seen by human while venturing outside!$l#I ran away quickly.#...$u#He wasn't surprised or scared though... weird.$u#
Aimon111.GoblinWinter1sttime: Say @, why is everything white and cold outside now?$l#Are there there cold seasons too?#And this weird white thing... You call it snow? I've never seen it before!$l
Aimon111.GoblinFancyBlanketquest: Thank you for agreeing to help, @$u#I'll just wait here near the fire then.#Brrrr...$s
Aimon111.GoblinFancyBlanketquestdone: This blanket is so soft and warm!$h#Now it will be alot easier to live through the cold seasons.
Goblin.AcceptBirthdayGift_(O)308: Oooh! Ooh! Give me that!$h#*munch-munch-munch*$6#...$3#Oh well, I already ate all of it...$2#Still it was a really good present, thank you!
Goblin.AcceptGift_(O)308: Ooh! Give me that!$h#*munch-munch-munch*$6#...$3#Oh well, I already ate all of it...$2#It runs out so quickly!#...$3#Say, where do you get that thing?$4
Goblin.AcceptGift_item_type_artifact: Oh, this thing looks fancy! Thank you.#I sometimes find something like those too.
Goblin.RejectMovieTicket: Huh, what is that nice looking shiny thing?$4#Is it tasty?$h#No? Oh well, better keep it then - I don't really know what to do with it anyways.
Goblin.AcceptGift_(O)StardropTea: *Sniff-Sniff*$6#What is that?$4#Smells weird... and tasty!$h#*munch-munch-munch*$h#Oooh! I've never tasted anything like so before! Thank you!$h
Goblin.GreenRain: There's a weird smell coming from the surface today...$4#Do you know what is that?
Goblin.GreenRainFinished: For some reason there's a bunch of forage just popped up from the ground recently...$4#Well, this means I don't need to worry about food for a long time now!$h
Goblin.GreenRain_2: There's a weird smell coming from the surface today...$4#Do you know what is that?
Goblin.spring_Mon: I travel around these caves on my boat. I find lots of weird things in those waters.#Sometimes really weird ones...$l
Goblin.spring_Tue: I saw a pink petal floating in the water today.#I catched it and put into soup later - it added sweet flavour!
Goblin.spring_Wed: The gardens?#There are some really tasty looking thigns growing in there!$l#But I can't touch it even if I try - they are protected with magic...$s#And the Witch never allowed me to try at least one of those, even If I asked!$u
Goblin.spring_Wed2: To be honest, I've never left those caves... It's too scary for me.$s#The fear of the surface is pretty common amongst goblins...$u
Goblin.spring_Wed4: The water may seem still but there's lots of hidden streams beneath.#It can easily sink your boat if you're not carefull enough!$l
Goblin.spring_Thu: I found an island full of huge bugs once.#Barely made it alive from it, phew!$l#Going there is dangerous for sure...$u#But the bug meat is so delicious!$h
Goblin.spring_Fri: The witch? I don't really know her much...$u#She offered me a job to guard this bridge to her house. She payed me with this tasty purple stuff!#Well, not every time... She haven't payed me since last year...$u#I'm glad that she fired me eventually. There's really no one to guard this place from anyway.
Goblin.spring_Fri2: Waters were generous to me today, I caught a lot of fish!#$b#Here' take some. Just... be careful so it won't bite your finger off! [795 143 716 Aimon111.WitchSwampOverhaulCP_Swamp_Leech Aimon111.WitchSwampOverhaulCP_Void_Minnow]$l
Goblin.spring_Fri4: Lots of fishes with long whiskers swim arond when it's raining outside.#What do you call them...Catfish?...What's a Cat?$l
Goblin.spring_Sat: Feeling kinda peckish today...$u#Hey, do you have anything tasty in your pockets?$h
Goblin.spring_Sat2: One time I threw my fishing pole really far away and something really big bit the hook!#So big that it torn my fishing line!$l#I just saw something huge splashed  and swam away...
Goblin.spring_Sun: I eat what I manage to find and catch - fish, herbs, shrooms, moss...#If you mix it all together in a pot, sometimes you'll get some tasty stuff!$h#...#Well, and sometimes not.$u
Goblin.summer_Mon: I don't really go outside these caves...#But sometimes I see sunbeams from the surface!$l
Goblin.summer_Tue: When water becomes warm here, algae starts to spread.#It's all becomes purple during that time!
Goblin.summer_Wed: How do you call this tasty purple thing you gave me?#Mayonese? And it's made out of void eggs?$l#What, like fish eggs or something?#Wait... what's a chicken?$l
Goblin.summer_Thu: Others like me? We live in tribes, separated by the waters.#Rules are pretty savage in there sometimes - that's why some of us prefer solitude.$l#I'm one of those 'sole guys' as you can see. $u
Goblin.summer_Fri: The gardens?#There are some really tasty looking thigns growing in there!$h#But I can't touch it even if I try - they are protected with magic...$s#And the Witch never allowed me to try at least one of those, even If I asked!$u
Goblin.summer_Fri4: There are 3 main survival rules every goblin knows.#Don't drink raw swamp water, don't talk to mushrooms, don't sleep on the mushroom island!$l#Why? Well, it's complicated...$u
Goblin.summer_Sat: I wouldn't recommend you to try swimming in those waters, especially this time of the year...$u#There's lots of leeches in there, hehe.
Goblin.summer_Sun: To be honest, I've never left those caves... It's too scary for me.$s#The fear of the surface is pretty common amongst goblins...$u
Goblin.summer_Sun2: Waters were generous to me today, I caught a lot of fish!#$b#Here' take some. Just... be careful so it won't bite your finger off! [795 143 716 Aimon111.WitchSwampOverhaulCP_Swamp_Leech Aimon111.WitchSwampOverhaulCP_Void_Minnow]$l
Goblin.fall_24: Goblins are known as nasty and greedy creatures...$u#But it isn't always so - even a goblin can be nice!$l#Same goes with people I guess.
Goblin.fall_Mon: Waters are getting colder every day.$u#It's time to stock up on supplies...
Goblin.fall_Tue: Sometimes water gets very high when it's raining outside.#So high that some of the islands become completely covered!$l
Goblin.fall_Wed: The gardens?#There are some really tasty looking thigns growing in there!$l#But I can't touch it even if I try - they are protected with magic...$s#And the Witch never allowed me to try at least one of those, even If I asked!$u
Goblin.fall_Wed2: To be honest, I've never left those caves... It's too scary for me.$s#But I can smell when it's raining outside.#I like that smell!$l
Goblin.fall_Wed4: There's lots of mushrooms start to pop up during this season, so I always have something to eat!#Here, take some too! [404 420 281]
Goblin.fall_Wed6: One time I've traveled through some really big cave...a really stinky one!$l#I've met a friend there, one of the Shadow people.#his name is Krobus... Maybe you've met them too?$l
Goblin.fall_Thu: Once upon a time there was an Ogre with a donkey that went to dangerous castle guarded by dragon and married a princess!$l#Every goblin knows that story.
Goblin.fall_Fri: There were times when Dwarves and Shadow people were engaged in war between each other.$l#But those caves always remained a 'neutral territory' so to speak.$u#Those times are long gone though.
Goblin.fall_Sat: One time I caught a big eel and it almost bit my finger off!$l#Be careful with what you catch I guess.
Goblin.fall_Sun: The witch? I don't really know her much...$u#She offered me a job to guard this bridge to her house. She payed me with this tasty purple stuff!#Well, not every time... She haven't payed me since last year...$u#I'm glad that she fired me eventually. There's really no one to guard this place from anyway.
Goblin.fall_Sun2: I've found a lot of interesting things today - so many that it won't even fit in my backpack!$l#Here take this one...#That's a cool one, right? [169 106 117 119 170 171 504 103 115 172 169 124]
Goblin.fall_26_2: Krobus said today's a special day for the Shadow people.#It's called Spirit's Eve. During this time they gather together and tell scary stories about humans!$l#Goblins have some traditions too... but I haven't heard about anything like so before!$l
Goblin.fall_28: Waters are getting colder every day.$u#I feel food will be scarce soon...$s#But it's ok - I made some supplies.
Goblin.winter_1: The cold season has came... I know forage will be scarce for some time.$u#I stocked up some supplies so I won’t go hungry.
Goblin.winter_1_2: The cold season has came... I know forage will be scarce for some time.$u#I stocked up some supplies so I won’t go hungry.
Goblin.winter_Tue: I just cooked some soup! Do you want some? It will warm you up.#Here, doesn't it smell delicious? [219 456 457]$h
Goblin.winter_Tue4: Sometimes it's so cold that water becomes hard and slippery near waterside!$l#But it melts in my hands if I try to pick up a piece.
Goblin.winter_Wed: I mostly just sit and sleep near campfire during cold seasons.#It's good I've collected lots of driftwood for keeping the fire on.
Goblin.winter_Thu: Sometimes I see dwarves in these caverns too.#We trade with each other since ancient times.$l#I got my hat from them!
Goblin.winter_Fri: Feeling sleepy today...$u#I sleep a lot when it's cold.
Goblin.winter_Sat: Haven't catched any fish today...$s#It's herb stew for today's meal I guess.$u
Goblin.winter_Sun: When it become warmer, there's more than enough food to eat.#You just have to know how to look for it!
extra_dialogue_GoblinZic: I can smell the fresh air from the surface...#Is it raining today, right?$l#I always liked this smell.
extra_dialogue_Aimon111.GoblinLinusGarba: Recently I was wandering near railroad.#I heard something moving in the dumpster.#I wanted to investigate but suddenly something huge with glowing red eyes jumped out of it!$u#Barely managed to run away from this creature!$u#Should I talk to Marlon about this, what do you think?
extra_dialogue_Aimon111.WizardQuestCrops: Have you collected the crop specimen yet?#...No, don't be afraid - it isn't dangerous...I think.
extra_dialogue_Aimon111.WizardQuestFerts: How's the specimen collecting process going?#...Ah, I see... don't forget I'll also need high quality fertilizers for my research!
extra_dialogue_Aimon111.WizardPie: That... 'Pie' incident...#...Can I rely on you that you won't tell about it to anybody... ever?
extra_dialogue_Aimon111.PotAccept: Oh, @! Good to see you!#I hope that new pot you purchased serves you well!$h
extra_dialogue_Aimon111.PotDeny: ...$a#...No, don't even try to negotiate the price even lower!$a
extra_dialogue_Aimon111.IronBars: I'll need 3 Iron Bars to smelt that cooking pot you've asked for.#Take your time, I can wait when you'll find the materials.
extra_dialogue_Aimon111.IronBarsDone: Thanks for ordering the pot from me.#I appreciate the opportunity you gave me to practice my skills in such task.$h
extra_dialogue_Aimon111.Blanket1: I'll need 5 Cloth and 5 Wool to make the blanket you've asked for.#There's no rush though - I can wait until you'll find the materials.
skulltalk.000: I wonder who's skull was it?
portaltalk.000: This portal takes you to the surface?$l#I'm kinda afraid of all that magic stuff.$u
portaltalk.001: Sometimes I smell the fresh air from the surface.$l#But I'm too afraid to go outside...$s#To be honest, I've never ever been into the surface...$u#But I see light beams from the ceiling sometimes!#Not today though.$u
givefishtalk.000: The waters were kind to me today, I catched a lot of fish!
givefoodtalk1.000: Found a lot of forage today, now I don't have to worry about food for tomorrow.
givefoodtalk.000: It's kinda cold today, so I've been sitting by the campfire all day.
giveshroomtalk.000: There's lots of mushrooms start to pop up during this season, so I always have something to eat.
giveshroomtalk1.000: I was foraging all day, found lots of tasty things!$h#Now I don't have to worry about food for tomorrow.
noforage.000: I searched for forage all day.#$c 0.5>#And I found lots of mushrooms!#Haven't found that much today...$s
nofish.000: I was fishing since this morning.#$c 0.5>#And I was really lucky today!#Haven't catched anything... guess it's mushroom stew for today's dinner again.$s
hutstare.000: I'm not allowed to go to other side now...$u#I don't really need anything there anyways, so it's fine.
hutstare2.000: Witch restricted me from going near her hut, so I can't cross that bridge anymore.$u
hutstare3.000: Sometimes there's fresh forage pops up but I can't reach it - Witch doesn't allow me to cross that bridge anymore.$u
gardening1.000: I like this job more than the previous one.# It's a lot better than standing near bridge all day.
gardening2.000: Hello @! I've been gardening all day since morning.#Just want to finish earlier today, so I could go foraging later.
gardening3.000: I'm trying my best but I think those crops would grow better on the surface.#I guess the soil there isn't that good for gardening.
surfacetalk.000: I just went outside to breathe some fresh air.#I really like to do so every now and then, after you helped me getting used to surface.#Especially when it's raining!$h#
surfacetalktrash.000: I smell something really tasty in there!$h
surfacetalk.002: Sometimes I see somebody comes by...#I always hide or run away.$u
surfacetalkWinter.001: I still can't get used to this white cold thing...$u#It's so shiny!
surfacetalkWinter.002: Brrrr.. It's a lot colder than undeground.$u#But I like it, everything is white and shiny!
event2.GoblinZic.Sorry_I_ran_away: Sorry, I ran away that last time...$s#
event3.GoblinZic.Just_couldnt_resist: Just couldn't resist the tasty smell of that stuff!$h
event4.GoblinZic.The_Witch: The Witch?... Eh, she fired me, of course...$u
event5.GoblinZic.But_she_hasnt_payed: But she hasn't payed in a long time so I'm not very sad about loosing this job.
event6.GoblinZic.Not_even_sure: Not even sure why did she even need a guard - nobody really goes here...$u#
event7.GoblinZic.It_was_kinda_lonely: It was kinda lonely to stand here, all by myself...$u
event9.GoblinZic.So_please_feel_free: So please, feel free to come here every now and then!
message11.You_reach_out: You reach out your hand to touch it...
event10.Alecto.What_are_you_doing: What are you doing in my gardens, may I ask?$a
event_question11.I_tried_to_touch: I tried to touch it and it hit me!
event11.Alecto.Oh_really: Oh, really? But I see burn marks on your palm.$h
event12.Alecto.Of_course_it_did: Of course it did! I casted a spell on them just for that!$h
event13.Alecto.Now_you_know: Now you know what happens with those who dare to think they can steal from me!$h
event14.Alecto.Didnt_want_to_steal: Didn't want to steal, you say... well, it's better to be that way.
event16.Alecto.You_see_these_crops: You see, these crops aren't doing good...
event17.Alecto.Probably_because_soil: Probably because the soil here isn't suitable for them... or something like that.$s
event18.Alecto.What_try_taking_care: What? Try taking care of them?$u
event19.Alecto.Phew_I_dont_have_time: Phew, I don't have time for that!$a
event20.Alecto.Im_a_witch_after_all: ...I'm a witch after all, not some 'garden lady'.
event21.Alecto.Anyways_I_was_thinking: Anyways, I was thinking... Since you are a farmer, you know how to craft a good fertilizer.
event_question13.Sure_where_get_ingredie: Sure but where should I get the ingredients?
event24.Alecto.I_leave_it_up_to_you: I leave it up to you, I'm sure you'll figure it out.$a
event25.Alecto.Just_put_fertilizers: Just put fertilizers in the basket near my hut when you'll finish.
event26.Alecto.Whats_that: What's that? I don't see smile on your face!$h
event27.Alecto.And_I_need_high_quality: And I need a really high quality stuff. Don't try to sneak on me and bring me regular one!
event28.Alecto.Or_else_turn_into_frog: ...or else I'll turn you into a frog!$h
event29.Alecto.Now_go: Now go, I have stuff to do.$s
message14.You_put_fertilizers: You put fertilizers in the basket.
message16.You_drink_the_potion: You drink the potion. The liquid is thick, with spicy and sweet taste.
message17.You_learned_Ginger_Tincture: You learned how to craft 'Ginger Tincture'!
event31.Alecto.You_brought_fertilizers: You brought fertilizers, even though they were expensive to craft.$u
event34.Alecto.What_needs_time: What? It needs time to take effect?$a
event35.Alecto.Phew_leave_up_to_Raz: Phew, spend my powers on this? I'll leave it up to Raz...$a
event36.Alecto.Why_farming_so_complicate: Why farming should be so complicated?...$s
event37.Alecto.So_you_want_reward: So, I guess you want some reward for your efforts?$s
event39.Alecto.Follow_me_inside: Follow me inside, I'll show you something.$h
event41.Alecto.Ill_teach_special_brew: I'll teach you how to make a special brew...
event43.Alecto.Firstly_herbal_decoction: Firstly a basic herbal decoction is made.
event46.Alecto.Already_been_on_Ginger_Is: You've already been on Ginger Island, right? Then you won't struggle with finding ingredients for this.
event49.Alecto.This_tincture_straightens: This tincture will straighten your body and give you immunity to some debuffs as well.
event50.Alecto.Also_good_for_digestive: It also could be a good medicine for digestive problems...
event_question15.Why_not_use_magic: Why can't you just use magic on these crops?
event55.Alecto.Suspected_good_fertilizer: I suspected those fertilizers were the good ones...
event58.Alecto.Crops_grew_so_big: These crops grew up so big... In fact, I don't even have so much space to keep all of them!$h
event59.Alecto.You_can_take_some: You know what? You can take some if you want.
event60.Alecto.Use_for_extra_profit: I'm sure you'll find a way to use it for some extra profit.
event61.Alecto.Give_some_to_Razzy: And be sure to give some to Razzy as a little present - he'll love it for sure!$h
event62.Alecto.Now_harvest_all: ...And now I have to harvest all of this.$s
event64.Alecto.Befriended_goblin: I saw you befriended that goblin guy... Is he good?
event65.Alecto.Fired_before_story: I fired him before... Well, you know the story.$s
event66.Alecto.Maybe_he_accept_offer: But maybe he'll accept the offer taking care of my garden... what do you think?
event67.Alecto.Sweet_talk_to_him: Oh, sweet. I'll talk to him then.$h
event70.Alecto.End_guess_right: ...Well, in the end I guess you're right.$s
event_question16.I_think_he_wouldnt_mind: I think he wouldn't mind a new job.

event215.Speak.Back_to_work: Well, I'll get back to my other stuff now.$u

event219.Speak.So_fancy: Woah... It's so fancy and soft!$h
event222.Speak.Warm_and_soft: It's so warm and soft, and even the pattern is beautiful!$h
event224.Speak.Give_back: This time I think I can give something to you too!
event226.Speak.Rock_found: It was laying on the bottom, glittering through the water so strong, so I picked it up with me.$l
event228.Speak.Maybe_like: So I thought, maybe you'll like to have it?$l
event229.Speak.Dont_know: I don't know what to do with it anyways.
event231.Speak.Return_favor: It isn't much but at least I can return the favor that way.$u
event232.Speak.Glad_you_like: I'm so glad you liked it!
event233.Speak.Nice_friend: You are a really nice friend, @.
event236.Speak.Found_box: I found this strange box in front of my doorway today's morning...
event237.Speak.Know_what: Do you happen to know what this is by the chance?
event239.QuickQuestion.Gift: Looks like a gift of sort?
event240.Speak.Thought_yours: To be honest, I thought it's yours.
event247.Speak.Who_gift: Who and why could even gift me a pie?
event248.Speak.Mumble_love_pies: *mumble* No one could know I love pies...*mumble*
event250.Speak.Eat_piece: ...I shall eat a piece to... check its aura...
event251.Speak.Dont_worry: Don't you worry - my body has been tempered through decades of magical training.$h
event252.Speak.No_harm: There's no material thing that could harm me anymore.
event255.Speak.Be_back: I'll BE BACK IN A MINUTE!
event256.Message.Note_under_pie: There's a note under the pie...
event257.Message.Note_content: Hi sweetie < ! Don't you ever miss me? I hope you'll love my present - It's a special recipe just for you!
event258.Message.Other_side: There's also text on the other side... Seems like the sheet was torn out of some kind of cooking journal.
event259.Message.Recipe_detail: '= Best Homemade Witch's pies!='#Ever wanted to treat someone with special delight? Then this recipe is for you! All you need is freshly harvested Void Essence and a looot of sweet sweet sugar!...#...and the last but the most important ingredient - the Strange Bun! (the more stale - the better, hehe)...#...mix it all together very well and let it cook at 200 degrees in the oven for whatever time you'll need it to: raw dough to burnt coals - it's up for you to decide!....
event260.Message.Learned_recipe: You learned how to cook a... 'Suspicious Pie'!
